load_model_b4c64_current_best:
105: def load_model_b4c64_current_best(
106:     checkpoint: Path,
107:     device: torch.device,
108:     board_size: int,
109:     win_length: int,
110:     channels: int,
111:     blocks: int,
112: ) -> PolicyValueNet:
113:     model = PolicyValueNet(board_size=board_size, channels=channels, blocks=blocks).to(device)
114:     model.win_length = win_length
115:     loaded = load_compatible_checkpoint(
116:         model,
117:         checkpoint,
118:         device,
119:         board_size=board_size,
120:         channels=channels,
121:         blocks=blocks,
122:     )
123:     if not loaded:
124:         raise RuntimeError(
125:             f"could not load compatible checkpoint: {checkpoint} "
126:             f"for board_size={board_size} channels={channels} blocks={blocks}"
127:         )
128:     return model
load_protected_dataset:
131: def load_protected_dataset(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
132:     data = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
133:     required = ["samples", "protected_eval_samples", "tail_eval_samples"]
134:     for key in required:
135:         if key not in data:
136:             raise ValueError(f"missing {key} in protected dataset: {path}")
137:     if not data["samples"]:
138:         raise ValueError("empty train samples")
139:     return data
main:
322: def main() -> int:
323:     args = parse_args()
324:     validate_args(args)
325: 
326:     torch.manual_seed(args.seed)
327:     np.random.seed(args.seed)
328: 
329:     data = load_protected_dataset(args.dataset)
330:     groups = [
331:         ("train_main_rank_11_50", data["samples"]),
332:         ("protected_eval_top10", data["protected_eval_samples"]),
333:         ("tail_eval_rank_gt50", data["tail_eval_samples"]),
334:     ]
335: 
336:     device = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")
337: 
338:     model = load_model_b4c64_current_best(
339:         args.init_checkpoint,
340:         device,
341:         args.board_size,
342:         args.win_length,
343:         args.channels,
344:         args.blocks,
345:     )
346:     reference_model = load_model_b4c64_current_best(
347:         args.reference_checkpoint,
348:         device,
349:         args.board_size,
350:         args.win_length,
351:         args.channels,
352:         args.blocks,
353:     )
354:     reference_model.eval()
355:     for p in reference_model.parameters():
356:         p.requires_grad = False
357: 
358:     anchors = load_anchor_samples(args.anchor_snapshots)
359:     anchor_tensors = make_anchor_tensors(anchors, device)
360:     train_tensors = make_multisuppress_tensors(data["samples"], device)
361: 
362:     before = {
363:         name: diagnose_summary(model, samples, device)
364:         for name, samples in groups
365:     }
366: 
367:     history = train(
368:         model,
369:         reference_model,
370:         train_tensors,
371:         anchor_tensors,
372:         args,
373:     )
374: 
375:     after = {
376:         name: diagnose_summary(model, samples, device)
377:         for name, samples in groups
378:     }
379: 
380:     rows: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
381:     for name, _samples in groups:
382:         row = {"group": name}
383:         row.update(summarize_delta(before[name], after[name]))
384:         rows.append(row)
385: 
386:     final_verdict = verdict(rows)
387: 
388:     write_csv(args.out_csv, rows)
389:     write_report(args.out_report, args, data, rows, history, final_verdict)
390: 
391:     print("device:", device)
392:     print("dataset:", args.dataset)
393:     print("init_checkpoint:", args.init_checkpoint)
394:     print("reference_checkpoint:", args.reference_checkpoint)
395:     print("board_size:", args.board_size)
396:     print("win_length:", args.win_length)
397:     print("channels:", args.channels)
398:     print("blocks:", args.blocks)
399:     print("train_rows:", len(data["samples"]))
400:     print("protected_rows:", len(data["protected_eval_samples"]))
401:     print("tail_rows:", len(data["tail_eval_samples"]))
402:     for row in rows:
403:         print(
404:             row["group"],
405:             "top10_delta=", row["top10_delta"],
406:             "rank_gt50_delta=", row["rank_gt50_delta"],
407:             "mean_rank_delta=", row["mean_rank_delta"],
408:             "target_prob_delta=", row["mean_target_prob_delta"],
409:         )
410:     print("verdict:", final_verdict)
411:     print("out_csv:", args.out_csv)
412:     print("out_report:", args.out_report)
413:     print("b4c64/current-best-safe no-save probe complete; no checkpoint saved")
414:     return 0
summarize_delta:
142: def summarize_delta(before: dict[str, Any], after: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
143:     keys = [
144:         "rows",
145:         "top3",
146:         "top5",
147:         "top10",
148:         "rank_gt50",
149:         "mean_rank",
150:         "mean_target_prob",
151:         "mean_worst_gap",
152:         "mean_pair_hinge_margin_025",
153:         "teacher_beats_worst",
154:         "teacher_beats_all",
155:     ]
156:     out: dict[str, Any] = {}
157:     for key in keys:
158:         out[f"{key}_before"] = before[key]
159:         out[f"{key}_after"] = after[key]
160:         if key != "rows":
161:             out[f"{key}_delta"] = float(after[key]) - float(before[key])
162:     return out
write_report:
235: def write_report(
236:     path: Path,
237:     args: argparse.Namespace,
238:     data: dict[str, Any],
239:     rows: list[dict[str, Any]],
240:     history: list[dict[str, float]],
241:     final_verdict: str,
242: ) -> None:
243:     path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
244:     lines: list[str] = []
245:     lines += ["# b4c64/current-best-safe protected no-save objective ablation wrapper report", ""]
246:     lines += ["## Scope", ""]
247:     lines += [
248:         "- b4c64/current-best-safe no-save probe only.",
249:         "- Optimizer runs in memory.",
250:         "- No checkpoint is saved.",
251:         "- No C export, no public benchmark, no promotion.",
252:         "",
253:     ]
254: 
255:     lines += ["## Architecture", ""]
256:     lines += [
257:         f"- board_size: {args.board_size}",
258:         f"- win_length: {args.win_length}",
259:         f"- channels: {args.channels}",
260:         f"- blocks: {args.blocks}",
261:         "",
262:     ]
263: 
264:     lines += ["## Inputs", ""]
265:     lines += [
266:         f"- dataset: `{args.dataset}`",
267:         f"- dataset_name: `{data.get('name', 'unknown')}`",
268:         f"- init_checkpoint: `{args.init_checkpoint}`",
269:         f"- reference_checkpoint: `{args.reference_checkpoint}`",
270:         f"- epochs: {args.epochs}",
271:         f"- lr: {args.lr}",
272:         f"- margin: {args.margin}",
273:         f"- ce_weight: {args.ce_weight}",
274:         f"- pair_weight: {args.pair_weight}",
275:         f"- worst_weight: {args.worst_weight}",
276:         f"- anchor_kl_weight: {args.anchor_kl_weight}",
277:         "",
278:     ]
279: 
280:     lines += ["## Group metrics", ""]
281:     lines += [
282:         "| group | rows | top3 delta | top5 delta | top10 delta | rank_gt50 delta | mean_rank delta | target_prob delta | mean_worst_gap delta | hinge delta | beats_worst delta | beats_all delta |",
283:         "|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|",
284:     ]
285:     for r in rows:
286:         lines.append(
287:             f"| {r['group']} | {r['rows_before']} | "
288:             f"{float(r['top3_delta']):.6f} | {float(r['top5_delta']):.6f} | "
289:             f"{float(r['top10_delta']):.6f} | {float(r['rank_gt50_delta']):.6f} | "
290:             f"{float(r['mean_rank_delta']):.6f} | {float(r['mean_target_prob_delta']):.8f} | "
291:             f"{float(r['mean_worst_gap_delta']):.6f} | "
292:             f"{float(r['mean_pair_hinge_margin_025_delta']):.6f} | "
293:             f"{float(r['teacher_beats_worst_delta']):.6f} | "
294:             f"{float(r['teacher_beats_all_delta']):.6f} |"
295:         )
296: 
297:     if history:
298:         final = history[-1]
299:         lines += ["", "## Final training terms", ""]
300:         lines += ["| term | value |", "|---|---:|"]
301:         for key in [
302:             "loss",
303:             "ce_loss",
304:             "pair_hinge_loss",
305:             "worst_hinge_loss",
306:             "anchor_kl",
307:             "mean_gap",
308:             "mean_worst_gap",
309:         ]:
310:             lines.append(f"| {key} | {final[key]:.8f} |")
311: 
312:     lines += ["", "## Verdict", "", final_verdict, ""]
313:     lines += ["## Decision", ""]
314:     lines += [
315:         "No checkpoint was saved.",
316:         "If the no-save probe fails, the next step should be another objective/data design change, not a saved run.",
317:         "",
318:     ]
319:     path.write_text("\n".join(lines), encoding="utf-8")
